nodes.name: Ploceus
nodes.summary: Ploceus（Ploceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联64种鸟类，如Yellow-legged weaver、Black-chinned weaver、Bannerman's weaver等64种鸟类。

nodes.name: Northern brown-throated weaver
nodes.summary: Northern brown-throated weaver（Ploceus castanops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Northern brown-throated weaver。

nodes.name: Northern brown-throated weaver
nodes.summary: The northern brown-throated weaver (Ploceus castanops) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in Uganda, Rwanda and adjacent northern Burundi, eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo, western Kenya and northwestern Tanzania. Hybridisation P. victoriae (Ash, 1986) is now thought to be a hybrid between P. castanops and P. melanocephalus. References External links Northern brown-throated weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch.
